title: D2 D2Result envelope spec
description: Schema for contracts/d2result-envelope/d2result-envelope.spec.json — the source-of-truth catalog of JSON property names for the D2Result Shape B wire envelope (the BFF gateway response shape that every frontend reads). DcsvIo.D2.Result.Envelope.SourceGen emits D2ResultEnvelopeFieldNames into DcsvIo.D2.Result; private/tools/ts-codegen emits the same catalog into @dcsv-io/d2-result. Both sides reference the codegen-emitted constants for the wire property names — the .NET D2Result properties carry [JsonPropertyName(D2ResultEnvelopeFieldNames.*)] attributes, and the TS gateway parser reads via the same camelCase constants. Cross-language wire drift is structurally impossible.

fields.description: Field-name entries for the D2Result envelope wire shape.

constName.description: Public C# / TS constant identifier — UPPER_SNAKE_CASE. Must be unique across the catalog.

value.description: Wire-format JSON property name — camelCase. Must be unique across the catalog.

deprecated.description: When true, the entry is deprecated: the generated C# constant + factory carry [Obsolete] and the TS constant + factory carry @deprecated. Additive — the entry is NEVER deleted. Deleting a deprecated (or non-deprecated) entry is a breaking change the JSON-diff gate fails.

deprecatedReason.description: Plain dev-facing English explaining why the code is deprecated; rendered into the [Obsolete("...")] message, the @deprecated JSDoc, and the changelog entry. NOT a TK key (developer-facing, not user-facing).

replacedBy.description: Wire code of the successor entry (e.g. RESOURCE_NOT_FOUND). Must reference a real, non-deprecated entry in the merged registry. Omit for pure retirement with no replacement.

sunset.description: ISO-8601 date for the future RFC 8594 Sunset response header. Edge-runtime-deferred: carried on the contract now, consumed by the Edge response middleware when it exists. Inert until then.
